scenarios.name: Conservative
scenarios.description: Modest rate reduction with high success probability

scenarios.name: Moderate
scenarios.description: Balanced approach targeting market median rates

conservative: Market rates have increased 8% year-over-year, but we're seeking stability
Our volume has grown 15% - we'd like to discuss volume-based pricing
We value the partnership and want to ensure mutual success
moderate: Current rates are 12% above market median based on our benchmarking
We've identified 3 competitive alternatives at lower rates
We're looking to align with market standards while maintaining quality
aggressive: Our analysis shows rates 20% above market benchmarks
We have strong alternatives ready to engage
We need significant rate reduction to justify contract renewal
